sourcesContent:
// src/design/linkHomeDesign.js
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  // Page layout – luxurious subtle gradient
  pageWrapper:
    "min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-slate-100/80 to-white px-5 sm:px-8 lg:px-10 xl:px-16 py-10 lg:py-16",

  container: "max-w-5xl mx-auto",

  // Header – executive & spacious
  header:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-6 mb-12 lg:mb-16",
  title:
    "text-3.5xl lg:text-4.5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-950 leading-tight",
  subtitle: "text-base lg:text-lg text-slate-600 font-medium mt-2 max-w-3xl",

  // Premium card – glassmorphism + deep shadow
  card:
    "bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl border border-slate-200/40 " +
    "shadow-2xl shadow-slate-300/20 overflow-hidden ring-1 ring-black/5",

  // Form section – clean with soft gradient
  formSection:
    "p-7 lg:p-10 border-b border-slate-200/50 bg-gradient-to-b from-white/80 to-slate-50/30",

  form: "flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-5 lg:gap-6",

  inputGroup: "flex-1 space-y-2",
  label: "text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-700",

  inputBase:
    "w-full bg-white border border-slate-300/70 focus:border-indigo-600/80 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100/50 " +
    "rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-base transition-all duration-200 outline-none shadow-sm " +
    "hover:shadow-md hover:border-slate-400/70 placeholder:text-slate-400",

  // Dark premium button – deep indigo-black gradient
  buttonPrimary:
    "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2.5 min-w-[180px] " +
    "bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-950 via-indigo-900 to-indigo-950 " +
    "hover:from-indigo-900 hover:via-indigo-800 hover:to-indigo-900 " +
    "active:from-indigo-950 active:via-indigo-950 active:to-indigo-950 " +
    "text-white/95 px-7 py-4 rounded-2xl text-base font-semibold " +
    "shadow-xl shadow-indigo-950/40 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-indigo-950/50 " +
    "active:shadow-inner active:shadow-black/30 active:scale-[0.985] " +
    "transition-all duration-200 border border-indigo-800/30",

  // List container
  listWrapper: "divide-y divide-slate-100/70",

  // Sortable row – premium hover lift + gradient
  row:
    "group relative grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto] lg:grid-cols-[64px_1fr_auto] items-center " +
    "gap-5 lg:gap-8 px-6 lg:px-10 py-5 lg:py-6 " +
    "hover:bg-gradient-to-r hover:from-indigo-50/30 hover:to-transparent " +
    "transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-0.5",

  dragHandle:
    "flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 lg:w-12 lg:h-12 rounded-xl cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing " +
    "text-slate-400/70 group-hover:text-indigo-700/90 transition-colors duration-200",

  nameArea: "flex flex-col gap-1.5",
  nameText: "font-bold text-slate-950 text-base lg:text-lg tracking-tight",
  urlText: "text-sm text-slate-600 font-medium truncate max-w-lg",

  badgeActive:
    "inline-flex px-3.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide " +
    "bg-emerald-100/90 text-emerald-800 border border-emerald-200/70 shadow-sm",

  badgeInactive:
    "inline-flex px-3.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide " +
    "bg-slate-100/90 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200/70 shadow-sm",

  actions:
    "flex items-center gap-4 lg:gap-6 opacity-70 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200",

  actionBtn:
    "p-2.5 rounded-xl text-slate-500 hover:text-indigo-800 hover:bg-indigo-50/80 " +
    "active:text-indigo-950 transition-all duration-150",

  // Empty state – elegant & inviting
  empty:
    "py-28 lg:py-40 text-center space-y-4 " +
    "text-slate-400/90 text-lg font-medium " +
    "bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-50/40 to-transparent",

  // Framer Motion variants – smooth spring feel
  itemVariants: {
    hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20, scale: 0.97 },
    visible: {
      opacity: 1,
      y: 0,
      scale: 1,
      transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 25 },
    },
    exit: { opacity: 0, y: -16, scale: 0.96, transition: { duration: 0.18 } },
  },
};
